gamecastle.style-dna.v1.name: GameCastle Style DNA
gamecastle.style-dna.v1.purpose: A cohesive low-resolution mobile-game raster-toon language: expressive readable silhouettes, chunky shape masses, controlled color ramps, organic cartoon shading, strong native-size character, and high-contrast game UI.

rejects: detail that collapses at target size

styleDNA.outline: a strong dark outer contour or dark edge mass that remains legible at the exact runtime size; it may vary organically instead of looking mechanically stroked
styleDNA.shapeLanguage: chunky low-resolution cartoon shapes, compact proportions, and large readable silhouette masses
styleDNA.colorLanguage: a deliberately limited local palette organized into a few clustered tone ramps; color choice is contextual, not the style identity
styleDNA.volume: controlled two-to-four-tone raster-toon shading with a small highlight where useful; no glossy plastic or realistic material rendering
styleDNA.characterProportion: expressive western-cartoon proportions with a compact body and oversized readable head or face where applicable
styleDNA.uiLanguage: high-contrast raster-toon game UI blocks with a strong contour, restrained shading, and one accent fill
styleDNA.sceneLanguage: layered broad silhouette masses and quiet play space; gameplay foreground must remain more readable than decoration

cohesionPolicy.principle: Structure gates use top-K palette concentration and major mass bins (>=5%), which tolerate SDXL soft anti-alias while rejecting diffuse photo-like spreads. Pairwise palette cohesion is enforced within sprite/scene groups after required slots accept; CLIP styleMargin remains a weak per-asset floor.

character: single front-view full-body only, no turnaround or second figure
large empty white margins around the subject
character-part: large empty white margins around the subject
character-animation: single front-view full-body only, no turnaround or second figure
large empty white margins around the subject
prop: large empty white margins around the subject

character-part: complete creature or multiple body parts

semanticPositiveTexts: one clear single game sprite of the requested subject
semanticNegativeTexts: a collage of mixed game assets
stylePositiveTexts: full-color chunky low-resolution 2D raster-toon mobile game sprite with bold dark ink outline and solid flat color fills
bright limited-palette western cartoon game art with compact readable silhouette masses and clean two-to-four-tone shading
styleNegativeTexts: grayscale monochrome pencil sketch line art or desaturated muddy colors
photorealistic photo anime cel glossy 3D render or dense microdetail that collapses at sprite size

positiveTexts: one isolated game asset cutout with clean empty space around its silhouette
negativeTexts: a logo badge, framed emblem, scenery, floor, or background shape attached to the subject

semanticPositiveTexts: exactly one complete cartoon character alone facing the camera

semanticNegativeTexts: a complete character instead of the requested component
a collection or sheet of unrelated components

positiveTexts: a close-up game sprite showing exactly the requested character component
negativeTexts: a complete character or a component sheet instead of the requested component

semanticPositiveTexts: exactly one animation-ready cartoon character alone facing the camera
one seamless orthographic game tile filling the image edge to edge
stylePositiveTexts: simple low-detail raster-toon top-down mobile game tile with clustered colors

positiveTexts: one single seamless square game tile filling the whole image
negativeTexts: a grid map made of many different tiles
a texture atlas containing repeated tiles

semanticPositiveTexts: one coherent empty gameplay background with a broad calm playable center
stylePositiveTexts: cohesive raster-toon cartoon game background with broad simple silhouette layers and quiet negative space

positiveTexts: one empty game background with a large calm open playable center
negativeTexts: a checkerboard grid map full of cells
a busy board made of many tiles

stylePositiveTexts: bold clean raster-toon cartoon impact effect with a readable silhouette and limited color ramps
bold clean raster-toon cartoon impact effect with a readable silhouette and limited color ramps
high-contrast raster-toon game UI with a strong contour, restrained shading, and one accent fill
